Dialog.name: MND_Temperance
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Аркана Помірності[n]може зараз допомогти мені поглибити наші стосунки...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}You see... there's this near-future sci-fi series that was popular a while back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I found it at a used bookstore and bought the whole series, but it's been sitting on my shelf for a long time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}I only started reading it after moving into the dorm, and it's really interesting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading sci-fi novels with Fuuka could[n]help with my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5001 0 0}If you're interested, would you like to read the first book?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5067 0 0}Do you want to continue reading that sci-fi series together?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um, if you're not too busy, I mean.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading sci-fi novels with Fuuka could[n]help with my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5074 0 0}{f 4 1}-kun, you're almost done reading that sci-fi series, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Um... Do you want to read together today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like Fuuka is looking[n]forward to hanging out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading sci-fi novels with Fuuka could[n]help with my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5096 0 0}I was hoping we could have a little discussion after you've finished reading it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5075 0 0}Actually, I brought more books from my home...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Fuuka will gain any[n]more new skills even if we read together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But reading sci-fi novels with her could[n]help with my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Wh-What do you think? Do you want to read more books together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5117 0 0}Glad to hear it! Okay, I'll go get them from my room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5053 0 0}Oh... You're probably busy, right? Sorry to bother you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Um... Do you still want to read together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Fuuka will gain any[n]more new skills even if we read together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But reading sci-fi novels with her could[n]help with my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading sci-fi novels with Fuuka could[n]help with my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}Um, {f 4 1}-kun... How are the rooftop planters doing?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I don't know much about gardening, but I'm kind of curious...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0616
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}Um, {f 4 1}-kun... Is it all right if I help tend to the rooftop planters, too?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've actually been interested in gardening for a while now. If you don't mind, could I join you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The quality of the produce might improve if[n]we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5067 0 0}Oh, {f 4 1}-kun... How are the rooftop planters doing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The quality of the produce might improve if[n]we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Can I help with your gardening again?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5075 0 0}Um I'd like to check on the rooftop planters today, if possible.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Do you have some time right now, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka seems determined...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The quality of the produce might improve if[n]we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Is that all right? Could we check on them together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5067 0 0}Do you want to go check on the rooftop planters together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Fuuka will gain any[n]more new skills even if she helps me garden.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But the quality of the produce might improve[n]if we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}I can spare some time today, so if there's anything I can help with, let me know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5025 0 0}Okay! Let's head to the rooftop, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Fuuka will gain any[n]more new skills even if she helps me garden.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But the quality of the produce might improve[n]if we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The quality of the produce might improve if[n]we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5002 0 0}If you're going to go check on the rooftop planters, can I join you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_112_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}Some people can't make it today, but would you still like to go?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5145 0 0}All right. Then let's meet in the usual place.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll let the others know. See you there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 0 0 0}These people already have plans, so they can't go tonight:[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_900_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}DEV: テキストは正式なものですが、[n]{f 1 5 0}イベントは再生されません。[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SEED_THINK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What should I plant...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SEED_DAY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like it can be harvested on {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 1}/{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_NO_PLANT_DORMITORY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, I don't think I've planted[n]anything in the rooftop planters yet...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_PLANT_CAN_NOT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like I won't be able to harvest it[n]before the Promised Day, January 31st...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_PLANT_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There should still be produce in the rooftop[n]planter that has yet to be harvested.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should harvest those first...[n]{f 1 1}
